title: Do not replace the approved technology stack (.NET 8 / ASP.NET Core / EF Core / SQL Server / React + TypeScript / Vite) without a new ADR.
statement: Do not replace the approved technology stack (.NET 8 / ASP.NET Core / EF Core / SQL Server / React + TypeScript / Vite) without a new ADR.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-001", "Invariant": "Do not replace the approved technology stack (.NET 8 / ASP.NET Core / EF Core / SQL Server / React + TypeScript / Vite) without a new ADR.", "Rationale": "The stack is settled and load-bearing; drift fragments the build and the ops story.", "Enforced by": "ADR-0001/0002/0003/0012; code review"}}

title: No distributed architecture — no microservices, message brokers (RabbitMQ/Kafka), service mesh, Kubernetes, or a second database — without a demonstrated, measured need recorded in an ADR. The default
statement: No distributed architecture — no microservices, message brokers (RabbitMQ/Kafka), service mesh, Kubernetes, or a second database — without a demonstrated, measured need recorded in an ADR. The default is a **modular monolith**.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-002", "Invariant": "No distributed architecture — no microservices, message brokers (RabbitMQ/Kafka), service mesh, Kubernetes, or a second database — without a demonstrated, measured need recorded in an ADR. The default is a **modular monolith**.", "Rationale": "Right-sized for on-prem, low-traffic, ≤20 users; premature distribution is pure cost.", "Enforced by": "ADR-0001; architecture tests; code review"}}

title: Do not depend on the organization's runtime infrastructure (CON-001). ACMP self-hosts and **bundles all runtime deps** — incl. self-hosted Keycloak (ACMP-owned realm) + SQL Server — in its own Docker
statement: Do not depend on the organization's runtime infrastructure (CON-001). ACMP self-hosts and **bundles all runtime deps** — incl. self-hosted Keycloak (ACMP-owned realm) + SQL Server — in its own Docker Compose stack; zero external runtime services in v1. Only external dependency = Webex (Phase 2).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-003", "Invariant": "Do not depend on the organization's runtime infrastructure (CON-001). ACMP self-hosts and **bundles all runtime deps** — incl. self-hosted Keycloak (ACMP-owned realm) + SQL Server — in its own Docker Compose stack; zero external runtime services in v1. Only external dependency = Webex (Phase 2).", "Rationale": "Self-contained deployment is a hard constraint from the operator.", "Enforced by": "ADR-0013/0014/0015; deployment config review"}}

title: Do not bypass authorization. Every endpoint and command goes through policy-based authorization (role + ABAC). Enforce least privilege and segregation of duties (verifier ≠ action owner; chairman is n
statement: Do not bypass authorization. Every endpoint and command goes through policy-based authorization (role + ABAC). Enforce least privilege and segregation of duties (verifier ≠ action owner; chairman is never sole vote counter).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-004", "Invariant": "Do not bypass authorization. Every endpoint and command goes through policy-based authorization (role + ABAC). Enforce least privilege and segregation of duties (verifier ≠ action owner; chairman is never sole vote counter).", "Rationale": "Governance integrity and least privilege.", "Enforced by": "ASP.NET policies; CapabilityHandler (ABAC); tests"}}

title: Do not create unaudited changes to governance records. Every state change emits an `AuditEvent`. **Votes, issued decisions, approved ADRs, and published minutes are immutable** — superseded, never edi
statement: Do not create unaudited changes to governance records. Every state change emits an `AuditEvent`. **Votes, issued decisions, approved ADRs, and published minutes are immutable** — superseded, never edited or deleted. Hash-chain votes/decisions/audit.
enforcement: ADR-0009; append-only audit; hash chain; tests
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-005", "Invariant": "Do not create unaudited changes to governance records. Every state change emits an `AuditEvent`. **Votes, issued decisions, approved ADRs, and published minutes are immutable** — superseded, never edited or deleted. Hash-chain votes/decisions/audit.", "Rationale": "Auditability and tamper-evidence of the system of record.", "Enforced by": "ADR-0009; append-only audit; hash chain; tests"}}

title: Do not treat AI-extracted content as authoritative. Any AI-suggested minutes/decisions/actions (Phase 3) are **candidates** until a human reviews and approves them. Treat transcripts/briefs as untrust
statement: Do not treat AI-extracted content as authoritative. Any AI-suggested minutes/decisions/actions (Phase 3) are **candidates** until a human reviews and approves them. Treat transcripts/briefs as untrusted input (OWASP LLM01).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-006", "Invariant": "Do not treat AI-extracted content as authoritative. Any AI-suggested minutes/decisions/actions (Phase 3) are **candidates** until a human reviews and approves them. Treat transcripts/briefs as untrusted input (OWASP LLM01).", "Rationale": "Human-reviewed automation; prevents unverified content entering the record.", "Enforced by": "ADR-0007 principle; human approval gate"}}

title: Do not store secrets in source control. Use externalized config + Docker secrets / `.env` (git-ignored). No connection strings, tokens, or keys in code or committed files.
statement: Do not store secrets in source control. Use externalized config + Docker secrets / `.env` (git-ignored). No connection strings, tokens, or keys in code or committed files.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-007", "Invariant": "Do not store secrets in source control. Use externalized config + Docker secrets / `.env` (git-ignored). No connection strings, tokens, or keys in code or committed files.", "Rationale": "Secret hygiene.", "Enforced by": "secret scanning; code review; `.gitignore`"}}

title: Do not implement a feature without tests and acceptance criteria. Each feature ships with unit + integration tests and satisfies its `AC-###`.
statement: Do not implement a feature without tests and acceptance criteria. Each feature ships with unit + integration tests and satisfies its `AC-###`.
enforcement: DoD; CI coverage gate; acceptance audit
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-008", "Invariant": "Do not implement a feature without tests and acceptance criteria. Each feature ships with unit + integration tests and satisfies its `AC-###`.", "Rationale": "No feature is \"done\" without demonstrable acceptance.", "Enforced by": "DoD; CI coverage gate; acceptance audit"}}

title: Do not break Arabic or RTL. No hardcoded user-facing strings — everything via i18n (EN + AR). Use CSS logical properties + `dir`. Every screen renders correctly in RTL. Dates are Gregorian (localized
statement: Do not break Arabic or RTL. No hardcoded user-facing strings — everything via i18n (EN + AR). Use CSS logical properties + `dir`. Every screen renders correctly in RTL. Dates are Gregorian (localized formatting).
enforcement: i18n parity check; RTL visual regression; review
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-009", "Invariant": "Do not break Arabic or RTL. No hardcoded user-facing strings — everything via i18n (EN + AR). Use CSS logical properties + `dir`. Every screen renders correctly in RTL. Dates are Gregorian (localized formatting).", "Rationale": "Bilingual/RTL is first-class, not a retrofit.", "Enforced by": "i18n parity check; RTL visual regression; review"}}

title: Do not duplicate Tarseem or Keystone functionality. Diagrams are rendered by Tarseem (JSON spec is the source of truth); research packages come from the optional Keystone workflow. No in-app diagram e
statement: Do not duplicate Tarseem or Keystone functionality. Diagrams are rendered by Tarseem (JSON spec is the source of truth); research packages come from the optional Keystone workflow. No in-app diagram engine or research methodology without a documented ADR.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-010", "Invariant": "Do not duplicate Tarseem or Keystone functionality. Diagrams are rendered by Tarseem (JSON spec is the source of truth); research packages come from the optional Keystone workflow. No in-app diagram engine or research methodology without a documented ADR.", "Rationale": "Avoid reinventing solved, owned capabilities.", "Enforced by": "ADR-0006/0007; code review"}}

title: Do not mask assumptions or open decisions. Inferences are recorded as `ASM-###`; unresolved decisions as `OQ-###` (use the recommended default but flag it). Never silently decide a flagged open questi
statement: Do not mask assumptions or open decisions. Inferences are recorded as `ASM-###`; unresolved decisions as `OQ-###` (use the recommended default but flag it). Never silently decide a flagged open question.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-011", "Invariant": "Do not mask assumptions or open decisions. Inferences are recorded as `ASM-###`; unresolved decisions as `OQ-###` (use the recommended default but flag it). Never silently decide a flagged open question.", "Rationale": "Keeps the unresolved visible and traceable.", "Enforced by": "assumption/open-question registers; review"}}

title: Do not overengineer. Right-size for an on-prem, low-traffic, ≤20-user internal tool. No premature abstraction, speculative generality, or enterprise patterns the problem doesn't demand.
statement: Do not overengineer. Right-size for an on-prem, low-traffic, ≤20-user internal tool. No premature abstraction, speculative generality, or enterprise patterns the problem doesn't demand.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-012", "Invariant": "Do not overengineer. Right-size for an on-prem, low-traffic, ≤20-user internal tool. No premature abstraction, speculative generality, or enterprise patterns the problem doesn't demand.", "Rationale": "Simplicity and maintainability at this scale.", "Enforced by": "code review; architecture tests"}}

title: Do not commit directly to `main`. Every phase/slice ships on a short-lived branch → PR → green CI → review (GO) → squash-merge → delete branch → sync local `main`. `main` stays green and deployable.
statement: Do not commit directly to `main`. Every phase/slice ships on a short-lived branch → PR → green CI → review (GO) → squash-merge → delete branch → sync local `main`. `main` stays green and deployable.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-013", "Invariant": "Do not commit directly to `main`. Every phase/slice ships on a short-lived branch → PR → green CI → review (GO) → squash-merge → delete branch → sync local `main`. `main` stays green and deployable.", "Rationale": "Reviewable, revertible, always-green trunk.", "Enforced by": "branch protection; CI; git workflow"}}

title: Do not let the UI drift from the reference design. Any screen with a matching `.dc.html` in [`ACMP product context/`](../../ACMP%20product%20context/) matches it exactly (read directly, not via MCP) —
statement: Do not let the UI drift from the reference design. Any screen with a matching `.dc.html` in [`ACMP product context/`](../../ACMP%20product%20context/) matches it exactly (read directly, not via MCP) — tokens/anatomy/states/iconography/RTL/light-dark/copy/AA — composed from the shared design system. No-reference screens compose from the design system + the IA spec and are flagged.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-014", "Invariant": "Do not let the UI drift from the reference design. Any screen with a matching `.dc.html` in [`ACMP product context/`](../../ACMP%20product%20context/) matches it exactly (read directly, not via MCP) — tokens/anatomy/states/iconography/RTL/light-dark/copy/AA — composed from the shared design system. No-reference screens compose from the design system + the IA spec and are flagged.", "Rationale": "Design is the visual source of truth; the package is the behavior source of truth.", "Enforced by": "design-parity ledger; visual regression; review"}}
